false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7495580732924906520","book_info":{"abstract":"【金手指+权谋+架空历史+仙侠+穿越】
嬴弈穿越到一个架空世界，成为王府世子，本以为从此就能过上逍遥王爷的好日子，却发现王朝已经内忧外患，外有异族虎视眈眈，内有义军揭竿而起，中枢内部诸王争位。江湖上，前朝余孽苦心经营三百载，图谋复国。诸多势力相互联合勾结，形式岌岌可危。
想要在这汉末唐末加明末的世界活下去，得靠自己一己之力扫清万里妖氛，扶大厦于既倒，力挽天倾。
嬴弈：“既然几位王兄都不能成事，不如我扶持公主老婆当女帝我当摄政王。既然动乱不休，那我就娶魔道大小姐，异族公主，正道仙子，前朝公主。反正都是我的女人，当天下事变成家事，这问题不就迎刃而解了吗？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ai/p2o9202ba6727d767d99be7721be5911749~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"章台梦","author_id":"","book_id":"7495580732924906520","book_name":"穿越成王府世子，我只想躺平","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c0b8a8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7495583953617699352","read_count":"790","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1170261"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"463","tags":"东方仙侠,奇幻仙侠,仙侠,玄幻,东方玄幻,多女主,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/p2o9202ba6727d767d99be7721be5911749~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779499498&x-signature=UkbwO1333aLwynyaNqdrat4sKWI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2867169870496511","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"120"},"log_extra":{"recommen
